[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HydrationOptions](../fast-element.hydrationoptions/index.html) &gt; [debugger](../fast-element.hydrationoptions.debugger/index.html)

## HydrationOptions.debugger property

Optional opt-in debugger that swaps the default minimal hydration mismatch error message for a rich "Expected … / Received …" report including an HTML snippet of the SSR DOM and structured `expected`<!-- -->/`received` fields on `HydrationBindingError` / `HydrationTargetElementError`<!-- -->. Obtained via `hydrationDebugger()` from `@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
debugger?: HydrationDebugger;
```
